$description: BIM spatial programme tokens — room and space archetypes for IFC-based BIM models. Each token represents a named spatial programme type with geometry, acoustic, and assembly references.

study.$description: Study / private office spatial programme tokens

private-office.$description: Private office space — 12-15 sqm, acoustic-rated enclosure per EN 12464-1

bsdd_uri.$description: Provisional URI — bSDD stable entry pending buildingSMART publication

acoustic_isolation_rw_db.$description: Minimum Rw (dB) partition-to-adjacent-office weighted sound reduction index

lighting_lux_min.$description: Minimum illuminance at working plane per EN 12464-1

lighting_lux_max.$description: Maximum typical illuminance at working plane per EN 12464-1

ceiling.$description: Suspended acoustic ceiling tile — sub-token alias
